stemHtml: If the field-length-limited take-off mass and V1 were calculated using balanced field-lengths, the use of any additional clearway in the calculation would cause…

options.a: an increased obstacle-limited take-off mass with the same V<sub>1</sub>.
options.b: an increased field-length-limited take-off mass and a reduced V<sub>1</sub>.
options.c: an increased field-length-limited take-off mass and an increased V<sub>1</sub>.
options.d: an increased obstacle-limited take-off mass and an increased V<sub>1</sub>.
